title: Add PhonePe redirect on QR code click

requirements.summary: Make QR code clickable to redirect to PhonePe payment interface
acceptanceCriteria: The QR code image on OrderForm.tsx is wrapped in a clickable element (button or link)
Clicking the QR code opens PhonePe payment interface with the QR code data
The interaction works on mobile devices where PhonePe app is installed
Visual feedback (cursor pointer, hover effect) indicates the QR code is clickable

file_operations.description: Wrap the existing State Bank of India QR code image (frontend/public/assets/generated/payment-qr.dim_400x400.png) in a clickable button element. Add onClick handler that attempts to open PhonePe app using the phonepe:// deep link scheme on mobile devices, with fallback to PhonePe web interface (https://phon.pe/) for desktop or when app is not installed. Add visual feedback with cursor-pointer class and hover effects (scale transform, opacity change) to indicate clickability. Ensure the button maintains the current QR code image dimensions and styling.
